历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category (including former Science Category) was approximately 15134 → 12995 → 13702 → 16680, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend. The 2025 baseline is about 16680, shifting back by about 2978 places compared to 2024, with significant fluctuation. The enrollment plan for this university in Sichuan Province for Physics Category was 115 in 2022, 112 in 2023, 122 in 2024, 125 in 2025, and 129 in 2026, showing a continuous slight expansion trend. In 2026, the enrollment expands by about 3.2% compared to 2025, slightly intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; ranked approximately 60th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with a stable ranking range of 43–61 in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle level comprehensive university. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Sociology was rated A, and World History was rated A-, representing its advantageous disciplines. These are directly related to the enrollment categories of Humanities and Social Sciences (Sociology Class/Liberal Arts Experimental Class), which have some appeal for liberal arts group applicants. The reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is 'significantly negative', mainly involving academic misconduct incidents (dean's paper fabrication reported, teacher's data forgery leading to dismissal, etc.), which may suppress some candidates' willingness to apply. Douyin popularity ranking is 48th (relatively hot), with moderate short video exposure. No obvious history of filing gaps was observed.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation, and Computer Science maintain consistently high social popularity (highly recommended/recommended), which highly matches the university's Physics Category enrollment categories (Electrical Class, Electronic Information Class, Science and Engineering Class), helping to maintain application heat. The total number of regular college entrance examination candidates in Sichuan Province in 2026 is about 535,000, an increase of about 15.6% compared to the total number in 2025 (about 462,767). Estimated Physics Category candidates are about 329,000 based on historical proportions, significantly expanding the competition base. Shanghai University is located in Shanghai, a first-tier city, which has strong regional appeal for cross-province candidates. In 2025, the university enrolled about 142 people in Sichuan Province (including all categories), accounting for about 3.97% of its total national enrollment, which is a moderately high out-of-province enrollment scale.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical ranking backward trend, slight enrollment expansion in 2026 (+3.2%), significant expansion of Physics Category candidates (+15.6%), and the potential psychological suppression of applications due to negative reputation events, competition is expected to slightly intensify based on the 2025 baseline of 16680. The predicted minimum ranking is about 17200, with a range of 16700–17700.

The 2025 baseline is about 3048, with a fluctuation range of about 600–1100 in the past three years. The enrollment plan for this university in Sichuan Province for History Category was 9 in 2022, 9 in 2023, 7 in 2024, 6 in 2025, and 7 in 2026. Compared to 2025, 2026 sees an expansion of about 16.7%, but the absolute number of planned places is small, so the expansion has limited impact on the competitive landscape. It is a Project 211 and Double First-Class university; in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks about 60th, belonging to the upper-middle level comprehensive universities.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: In the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, the reputation evaluation is 'clearly negative', mainly involving academic misconduct incidents, which may somewhat suppress some candidates' willingness to apply. Its Douyin popularity ranks 48th (relatively hot), with moderate exposure. Sociology is rated A, and World History is rated A-, which are highly relevant to the History Category enrollment majors (Liberal Arts Experimental Class including Philosophy, Chinese Language and Literature, Journalism, Archaeology, etc.), strongly attracting liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Chinese Language/Chinese Literature majors are socially recommended, Journalism and Communication majors are clearly discouraged, and Law is divided with mixed opinions. In 2026, the total number of ordinary college entrance examination takers in Sichuan Province is about 535,000, with an estimated 206,000 History Category candidates based on historical proportions, an increase of about 15.7% compared to the 177,978 History Category candidates in 2025, expanding the competition base. Shanghai University is located in Shanghai, which has strong regional appeal for cross-province candidates. 预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the fluctuation characteristics of historical rankings, the slight expansion in 2026 (+16.7%), the increase in History Category candidates (+15.7%), and the appeal of advantageous disciplines to liberal arts candidates, the ranking is expected to shift slightly backward from the 2025 baseline of 3048. The predicted minimum ranking is about 3403, with a range of 2903–3903.
